title: angelica inaequalis
intro: Angelica inaequalis, also known as Dong Quai, is a type of perennial plant native to China, belonging to the carrot family. The medicinal properties of Angelica inaequalis include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce menstrual cramps. The health benefits of this plant include relief from menstrual pain, improved circulation, and reduced risk of cardiovascular disease, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Angelica inaequalis can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
